verses.text: Tua ciangin a ngana vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantung panin leitungah aksi khat a leengsuk ka mu hi. Tua aksi tungah kuahawm thukpi hon'na tawhtang a kipia hi
Amah in tua kuahawm thukpi a hon' ciangin meiphualpi panin meikhu bangin meikhu tampi hong pusuak a, tua meikhu hangin ni mialin khim a zing hi
Tua meikhu sung panin kauphete hong pusuakin leitungah pai uh a, momaite' neih bangin a gupha mahmah amaute tungah a kipia hi
Amaute in lopate, singkungte-a kipan a hing khat peuhpeuh bangmah cihloin, a taltang uhah Pasian' ciamtehna a omlo mite bek a gimsakna dingun thu a kipia hi
Amaute in tua bang mite thatloin kha nga sung a bawlsiatna ding uh thu kipia a, amaute' bawlsiatna pen momai in mi a deh ciangin a na tawh kibangin a na velval ahi hi
Tua hun ciangin mite in a sihtheihna ding uh a zon'zon' uh hangin sihtheihna ding lampi mulo ding uh a, sinuam mahmah napi-un sithei hetlo ding uh hi
Tua kauphete' pianzia pen galsim dingin a kithawi sakolte tawh kibang uh hi. A lu tung uhah kham lukhu tawh a kibang khu uh a, a maitang uh mihing maitang tawh a kibang hi
A sam uh numei sam tawh kibang a, a ha uh humpinelkai ha tawh a kibang hi
A awm uh, sik-awmdal tawh a kibang pian in tuam a, a khazap uh a gingte pen galkido laitakin sakol in a kaih leeng tampite' gin' tawh a kibang hi
Momai bangin mei nei-in mi dehthei uh a, tua a mei uh tawh mihingte kha nga sung gimsak theihna ding gu a nei uh hi
Amaute in tua kuahawm thukpi a uk vantung mi pen kumpi-in nei uh a, tua vantung mi a min pen Hebru pau-in Abaddon hi a, Grik pau-in Apollion hi a, “A Susiapa,” a cihnopna ahi hi
Tu-in gimna khatna a beina hita a, ahi zongin gimna nam nih hong tung lai ding a om hi
Tua ciangin a gukna vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, Pasian' mai-ah a om kham kibawl biakna tau kiu lite panin awging khat ka za hi
Tua awging in peengkul a tawi vantung mi a gukna kiangah, “Eufratis Gun lianpi-ah a kihencip vantung mi lite khahkhia in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin leitung mi khempeuh sehthumsuah sehkhat a thahding uh a kum, a kha, a ni, a nai hun ngakin a kigingsa-in a om tua vantung mi lite a kikhahkhia hi
Mi a that ding sakol tung tuang galkap mak sawmnih pha hi, ci-in hong kigen hi

Ka maang sungah ka muh sakolte leh a tungah a tuangte pen hih bang ahi hi: Sakol tung tuangte in mei bangin a san, sapfaia suangmanpha bangin a dum, kat bangin a eng, awmdal a bulh uh hi. A sakol lutangte pen humpinelkai lutang tawh kibang a, a kam uh panin meikuang, meikhu, leh kat a pusuak hi
Hih sakolte' kam panin a hong pusuak meikuang, meikhu, leh kat, hih gimna nam thumte in leitung mi sehthumsuah sehkhat a sisak hi
Hih sakolte in a kam leh a mei uhah gu nei uh a, a meite un gul tawh kibangin lutang nei ahih manin a meite uh tawh mi a liamsak uh hi

Hih gimna tawh a silo midangte pen amau' gamtatnasa panin kikheelkik nuamlo uh hi. Dawi a biaknate uh, khua a mu theilo, khua a za theilo, lam a pai theilo ngun, kham, sumngo, suang, leh sing a kibawl milim a biakte uh khawl tuanlo uh hi
A mi thahna, a aisanna, a paktatna, leh a guktaknate uh zong khawl tuanlo uh hi.
